channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Tom Brady explains why his answer is 'no' to Bill Belichick heading to college football
item.description: With reports surfacing that Bill Belichick interviewed for UNC's head coach vacancy, Tom Brady explained why he cannot see his old leader going to a college program.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Another final-second victory puts the Chiefs in prime spot to secure AFC's No. 1 seed: Analysis
item.description: A thunderous doink helped the Kansas City Chiefs gain some breathing room in the race for the No. 1 seed in the AFC after the Buffalo Bills fell short despite Josh Allen’s spectacular performance.
item.dc:creator: Rob Maaddi, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Dodgers reach $17M, 1-year deal with Conforto and $22M, 2-year contract with Treinen, AP sources say
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — The Los Angeles Dodgers agreed to a $17 million, one-year contract to add outfielder Michael Conforto and a $22 million, two-year deal to retain right-hander Blake Treinen, people familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Utah HC beats Flyers to sweep East Coast road trip
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (ABC4 Sports) - For the first time since the first week of the NHL season, the Utah Hockey Club has won back-to-back games, and they did it on back-to-back nights.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Embiid scores 31 in his return, Maxey has his first triple-double, Sixers beat Bulls 108-100
item.description: Joel Embiid had 31 points and 12 rebounds in his return, Tyrese Maxey got his first career triple-double and the Philadelphia 76ers held on to beat the Chicago Bulls 108-100 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Josh Allen's record day not enough as Bills' 7-game winning streak is snapped by Rams
item.description: Josh Allen became the first player to have three touchdown passes and three rushing TDs in the same game.
item.dc:creator: Joe Reedy, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Juan Soto's $765M deal with the Mets is the largest in MLB history. Here's who he passed
item.description: Juan Soto and the New York Mets agreed to a record $765 million, 15-year contract Sunday night, a person familiar with the deal told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Dave Parker and Dick Allen elected to baseball's Hall of Fame
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Having waited for the call from Cooperstown for nearly three decades, Dave Parker burst into tears Sunday when he was elected to baseball’s Hall of Fame along with the late Dick Allen. “Yeah, I cried,” Parker said after receiving the news from Hall chair Jane Forbes Clark.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: LeBron James misses 1st game this season, sidelined versus Portland due to left foot soreness
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — LeBron James will sit out Sunday's game against the Portland Trail Blazers due to left foot soreness, the NBA career scoring leader's first missed game of the season.
item.dc:creator: DOUG PADILLA, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Chris Paul moves into 2nd on NBA's career assists list against Pelicans
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — San Antonio Spurs point guard Chris Paul moved to second on the NBA's all-time assists list against the New Orleans Pelicans, the franchise where his 20-year career began, on Sunday The 39-year-old Paul collected his 12,092nd assist on a 3-pointer from Victor Wembanyama with 7:06
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Allen sets NFL mark with 3 TD passes and 3 TD runs, but Stafford's Rams hold off Bills 44-42
item.description: The Los Angeles Rams overcame Josh Allen’s record six-touchdown performance to snap the Buffalo Bills’ seven-game winning streak with a 44-42 victory.
item.dc:creator: Greg Beacham, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Brayden Point's 4-point night leads the Lightning over the Canucks 4-2
item.description: Brayden Point scored twice and added two assists, and the Tampa Bay Lightning edged the Vancouver Canucks 4-2 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Bears blasted by 49ers in Brown's head-coaching debut, drop to 4-9
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (WGN) — New head coach. Same old Chicago Bears. Thomas Brown made his head coaching debut in replacement of Matt Eberflus, but as they've done so many times this season, the Bears got off to a slow start on offense and the San Francisco 49ers wasted no time putting points on the board.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Scottie Scheffler ends his big year in the Bahamas with his 9th victory
item.description:
Scottie Scheffler returned from a two-month break and nothing changed. He won the Hero World Challenge on Sunday with a 9-under 63 to tie the tournament record at Albany Golf Club and win by six shots.
Scheffler, the first player since Tiger Woods in 2009 to spend an entire calendar year at No.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Saints QB Derek Carr injures left hand on dive in 4th quarter of win over Giants
item.description: New Orleans Saints quarterback Derek Carr injured his left hand late in the fourth quarter of Sunday's 14-11 victory over the New York Giants when he went airborne while trying for a first down and crashed to the turf.
item.dc:creator: TOM CANAVAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Big Ten wins playoff selection derby, followed by SEC despite notable Alabama omission
item.description: College football's conference shakeup left concerns about two super conferences dominating the playoff field. They weren't totally unfounded or 100% borne out. The Big Ten, not the Southeastern Conference, was the biggest winner Sunday. The ACC scored, too.
item.dc:creator: JOHN ZENOR, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Tamar Bates scores 29 points to help Missouri beat No. 1 Kansas 76-67
item.description: COLUMBIA, Mo. (AP) — Tamar Bates had 29 points and five steals to help Missouri beat Hunter Dickinson and No. 1 Kansas 76-67 on Sunday. Mark Mitchell scored 17 points in Missouri’s first win over Kansas since a 74-71 victory on Feb. 4, 2012.
item.dc:creator: DAVID SOLOMON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Nick Saban questions strength of schedule factor in CFP as Alabama misses field
item.description: Former Alabama Crimson Tide head coach Nick Saban wondered if strength of schedule was really a factor when it came to the College Football Playoff.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lando Norris wins season-ending Abu Dhabi Grand Prix to seal constructors' title for McLaren
item.description: Lando Norris ended McLaren's 26-year wait for the Formula 1 constructors' title as he won the season-ending Abu Dhabi Grand Prix on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: No. 1 Oregon staves off valiant Penn State effort to win Big Ten title
item.description: The Oregon Ducks moved to 13-0 by winning the Big Ten championship game over Penn State on Saturday, ensuring a first-round bye in the playoff.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Baltimore Orioles reach $49.5M, 3-year deal with OF Tyler O'Neill, AP source says
item.description: The Baltimore Orioles have agreed to a $49.5 million, three-year contract with outfielder Tyler O'Neill, according to a person familiar with the negotiations. The person spoke to The Associated Press on Saturday on condition of anonymity because the agreement was subject to a successful physical.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utes drop first home game to St. Mary's, 72-63
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Runnin' Utes had won its first six home games by an average margin of 32 points. But they hadn't played a team as talented as Saint Mary's. The Gaels came into the Huntsman Center Saturday, and led by Paulius Murauskas, beat the utes, 72-63.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: LA Galaxy strike early, hold off New York Red Bulls 2-1 to win their record 6th MLS Cup championship
item.description: CARSON, Calif. (AP) — The LA Galaxy finished 26th in the 29-team Major League Soccer standings just one season ago, and their biggest supporters boycotted certain matches to protest a decade of poor performance.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: NFL QB Jayden Daniels scores Christmas toys for kids in San Bernardino
item.description: What does a rising star in the NFL do when his team is on its bye week? Washington Commanders quarterback Jayden Daniels decided to make sure the kids back home have a great holiday season.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Jazz cruise to rare blowout win over Portland, 141-99
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - In what has been an extremely difficult rebuilding year, the Utah Jazz will relish nights like this one.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: MLS Cup championship sold out as Los Angeles Galaxy shoot for 6th title
item.description: It will be a packed crowd Saturday when the Los Angeles Galaxy attempt to capture their league-record sixth MLS Cup. The Galaxy will face off with the New York Red Bulls at Dignity Health Sports Park at 1 p.m., and team officials said tickets have sold out.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Indiana plays Chicago on 8-game road slide
item.description: Indiana Pacers (9-14, 10th in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (10-13, eighth in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Friday, 8 p.m. EST BETMGM SPORTSBOOK LINE: Pacers -3; over/under is 247 BOTTOM LINE: Indiana travels to Chicago looking to break its eight-game road losing streak.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Chicago Blackhawks fire Luke Richardson, IceHogs' Sorensen named interim head coach
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — Chicago Blackhawks General Manager Kyle Davidson announced Thursday the team has fired head coach Luke Richardson. Rockford IceHogs head coach Anders Sorensen has been named interim head coach and will assume duties immediately.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Batty, Ferrin named to All-Big 12 first team
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Three Cougars were named first-team All-Big 12 including defensive end Tyler Batty, offensive left tackle Caleb Etienne and kicker Will Ferrin. In addition, senior defensive back Jakob Robinson and junior kick returner Keelan Marion earned All-Big 12 Second Team honors.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: St. Pete City Council votes in favor of bond purchase to pay for Rays stadium
item.description: The St. Petersburg City Council voted Thursday in favor of purchasing bonds that would fund a portion of the new Rays stadium and the redevelopment of the Gas Plant District.
item.dc:creator: Alessandra Young, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Westfall's live commitment, Akili to Oregon lead National Signing Day in San Diego
item.description: Silver Pigskin winner Akili Smith Jr went to the same program his father helped build, choosing Oregon Wednesday morning. His Silver Pigskin finalist teammate Aden Jackson is staying closer to home, going with UC Davis.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Stone, Fox 5
